headline: VIG Returned 223% Over 10 Years and Still Costs Almost Nothing
summary: A 1.5% yield sounds unimpressive until you realize the dividend check doubles roughly every seven years. That is the premise behind the Vanguard Dividend Appreciation ETF (NYSEARCA:VIG): skip the high-yield traps and own companies that raise their dividends year after year, compounding income alongside capital appreciation. What VIG Is Actually Trying to Do VIG tracks ... VIG Returned 223% Over 10 Years and Still Costs Almost Nothing

headline: Assessing Caterpillar’s Valuation As It Powers Nscale’s Massive AI Compute Campus
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) is back in focus after being selected to power Nscale’s massive Monarch AI campus in West Virginia, supplying natural gas generators capable of delivering up to two gigawatts of on-site power. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. The latest contract comes as Caterpillar’s share price sits at US$716.63, with a 90 day share price return of 22.76% and a very large 1 year total shareholder return of 112.04%, suggesting momentum has been strong despite a 5.67% 30 day share...

headline: CAT Strategic Metals Consolidates 100% Ownership of Its Burntland Porphyry-Skarn Copper-Silver Project in New Brunswick and Announces Private Placement Offering
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - March 25, 2026) - CAT Strategic Metals Corporation (CSE: CAT) (OTC Pink: CATTF) (FSE: 8CHA) ("CAT" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that it has entered into an agreement with arm's length private vendors to acquire the remaining 49% minority interest in its Burntland Porphyry-Skarn Copper-Silver Project located in New Brunswick, Canada (the "Property"). The original Exploration And Option Agreement relating to the Property was entered into..

The original Exploration And Option Agreement relating to the Property was entered into..
